name: My claim involves both injury and disease from same exposure—how to file?
description: File under ODA for disease; exclusive paths.[1]

mainEntity.name: My claim involves both injury and disease from same exposure—how to file?

acceptedAnswer.text: File under ODA for disease; exclusive paths.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Classify under ODA if disease-dominant; WCA/ODA mutually exclusive.[1] Utah courts determine based on facts like lead poisoning.[1] Key factors: primary cause analysis, medical classification. Seek ruling if disputed; dual filing risks denial. Accurate categorization key.
